title: Output Format Counter
description: The Output Format Counter directory is responsible for tracking the number of bytes written by Task classes. It collaborates with the FileOutputFormatCounter.java file to define a set of named counters for this purpose. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a centralized location for tracking output format-related metrics. This directory follows the Singleton pattern to ensure that only one instance of the counter is created and accessed by all Task classes.

raw_response:
TITLE: Output Format Counter

DESCRIPTION:
The Output Format Counter directory is responsible for tracking the number of bytes written by Task classes. It collaborates with the FileOutputFormatCounter.java file to define a set of named counters for this purpose. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a centralized location for tracking output format-related metrics. This directory follows the Singleton pattern to ensure that only one instance of the counter is created and accessed by all Task classes.
